title: Crumble de Cure
description: A savory, tender Algerian dish featuring breadcrumbs and prosciutto (cure) for a keto-friendly date-night meal.

ingredients.name: Breadcrumbs
ingredients.notes: Use bread made from whole grains or keto-friendly breadcrumbs

ingredients.name: Olive Oil
ingredients.notes: Optional, for greasing the baking dish if needed

instructions: Grind the prosciutto into small pieces using a food processor or mortar and pestle. Make sure it's uncooked.
Combine the ground prosciutto, breadcrumbs, grated Parmesan cheese (if using), salt, pepper, and olive oil in a mixing bowl. Mix until well combined and evenly coated with crumbs.
Transfer the crumble mixture onto a baking dish lined with parchment paper or sprayed with cooking spray to prevent sticking.
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown and crispy on top.
Remove from oven and allow to cool slightly before serving.
